_about: Shared cross-plane parity query set for edh-core-v{N}.kyro (Part B). The SAME file is embedded + retrieved on BOTH planes (cloud BGE-M3 here; device llama.rn BGE-M3) and the top-3 retrieval is diffed. Acceptance bar: on >=95% of queries the top-3 chunk SET is identical AND there is no swap within the top-3 (top-4/5 may reorder). Clinical strings span the acute-TBI/EDH decision space the corpus + L1 spine cover.
